text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: ...Is she here?

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text:
Ah, Biwa Hayahide! Congratulations on your URA
award for the senior division!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
...Thank you so much. It's truly an honor to
receive such praise.

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text:
This year's URA award recipients are truly
impressive, yourself and Hishi Amazon included.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Yes, I agree.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Amazon has the spectacular achievement of
becoming the Triple Tiara Champion.

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text:
It's a shame your sister isn't in attendance. Since
the Satsuki Sho, I was sure she'd be invited...

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text: Oh! Excuse my rambling! Um... I...

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text:
I can't wait to see you race again, so I'm praying
your leg heals soon!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Ah...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: ...I appreciate that.

Training resumes after the holidays. One day,
after training...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: It's not even six yet.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...I can still run.
choice_data_list:
Taking care of your health is also part of your
training.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Meh...

It's great that she has spirit, but cold winter air
can give rise to a variety of problems.

Taking that into consideration, I've been extra
careful about warm up and cooldown times.
choice_data_list: I want to make sure you don't get injured.
I want to make sure you don't get injured.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Such a worrywart.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Fine. But I can't get stronger by resting all the
time. I know that all too well.

After cleaning up, I escort Narita Brian back to
her dorm. On the way there...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Hey, Sis. Are you on your way back?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Oh, were you training until now? You're really
working hard, huh?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Actually, we finished early because of nervous
Nellie over here.
choice_data_list: Training was the same as always!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Hmph...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Hehe. It seems like you two make a good team.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Brian's not usually willing to listen to what others
have to say.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I listen. If it'll make me stronger.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
My trainer is no slouch. That much is clear to me
since we got through the Twinkle Series last year.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure I still don't fully understand what strength
is.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
So I want to learn. And I want the strength to
compete against the toughest opponents.
choice_data_list: And I'm here to support you.
And I'm here to support you.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Yeah.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
...You two are serious about running to the bitter
end.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
...You're exactly the type of person I wanted to compete
against

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: You okay, Sis?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: ...A-ah. It's nothing, sorry...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Say, Brian. How about a scrimmage?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I'm looking forward to the day I can face off
against you as a rival. I still can't do the distance
of a regular race, but perhaps if it was shor—

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Thanks, but no. Right now, I'm still working on
myself, and I consider you one of the strongest
opponents I have to defeat.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
If it's a race you want, what better place than a
G1?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: ...I see.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Sorry for holding you up. I'll see you later.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
choice_data_list:
It'd be nice if you could compete against Biwa
Hayahide this year.

It'd be nice if you could compete against Biwa
Hayahide this year.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah. As you already know, my sister is strong.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
But I'm not going to lose. I plan to leave everyone
in the G1 in the dust!
